framework.name: Agentic Commerce Evolution Timeline
framework.description: Commerce automation evolved through stages: basic e-commerce (manual search) → recommendation engines → AI co-pilots → agentic commerce (full delegation). Each step reduced human involvement until the system takes responsibility for outcomes.
framework.raw_quote: we all started with basic e-commerce, right? You had to search for everything yourself. Then came the recommendation engines... More recently, we've had AI co-pilots... Agentic commerce is that final leap where the system itself takes responsibility for the whole outcome.
